title: Betfair Prediction/Value League Scientific Collaboration 18
thesis: Evolve parallel probability models and policy gates until the best value-betting league earns execution rights. This variant fuses bayesian/causal researcher guidance with information theory researcher, econometrics researcher to test causal priors and uncertainty-aware edge filtering; entropy compression, surprise detection, and cross-feed information gain; stability-aware factor combinations and regime-conditioned edge persistence.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
